ranked_jobs.title: Product Manager, Commerce Systems
why: Role focuses on harmonizing and unifying multiple internal systems into a single platform, aligning with enterprise platform transformation and modernization
Strong emphasis on cross-functional leadership partnering with engineering, finance, legal, and go-to-market teams indicates broad enterprise scope rather than a single business function
Remote US locations available, matching preference for remote roles
Responsibilities include architecting for velocity and reducing integration friction, which aligns with system consolidation and operating model efficiency
Preferred qualifications include experience in fintech and managing technical software products from infancy to scale, which aligns well with enterprise transformation

ranked_jobs.title: Technical Program Manager, Internal Systems
why: Role involves large-scale technical program management across multiple teams and systems, aligning with platform transformation and system consolidation.
Focus on building frictionless internal platforms for internal users (Sellers and Finance Engineering) fits the enterprise platform modernization context.
Remote full-time position fitting candidate's preferred work location and employment type.
Responsibilities include driving engineering execution, defining cross-functional strategy, and operationalizing critical cross-functional programs, all relevant to enterprise transformation.

ranked_jobs.title: Senior Program Manager, Product & Platform Compliance
why: Role involves large-scale regulatory compliance program management across multiple jurisdictions, indicating complex, cross-functional program execution
Focus on building scalable compliance infrastructure and frameworks aligns with enterprise platform transformation and governance
Remote role within a technology company fits preferred location and sector
Strong emphasis on compliance, audit methodologies, and regulatory risk assessment aligns with governance and operating model redesign
Independent ownership of strategic compliance programs involving multiple key stakeholders indicates senior program management level

ranked_jobs.title: Senior/Staff Design Program Manager
why: Senior Design Program Manager role focused on complex, multi-quarter, cross-functional initiatives involving Design, Product, Engineering, Marketing, Legal, and Business Development.
Strong emphasis on operational excellence, programmatic execution, governance, and building scalable systems for capacity planning and resource allocation.

Involves working with design systems and technical fluency with design tooling platforms, aligning with system evolution and component adoption which matches system consolidation and governance focus.
Remote role within Canada, matching remote preference.

ranked_jobs.title: Product Manager, Stripe Infrastructure
why: Role involves enterprise-scale platform transformation with a focus on modernizing Stripe's core infrastructure and systems
Responsibilities include system and design principles for building and operating Seller Systems, indicating governance and sustainable ecosystem design
Focus on delivering reliable, scalable infrastructure and developer experience aligns with platform modernization priorities
Remote role, suitable for distributed work
Strong cross-functional collaboration with engineering, product, and leadership aligns well with enterprise environment
